activity_summary: A field operations manager assigns, reschedules, or escalates a repair visit using route, parts, and SLA constraints.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: A dispatch workbench for choosing the next action on a same-day repair visit with route, parts, site access, and SLA constraints visible.
parsed.css: :root{font-family:Inter,Arial,sans-serif;color:#18212f;background:#f4f6f8}*{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0}.dispatch-shell{min-height:900px;background:#f4f6f8;padding:22px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:300px 1fr 360px;gap:18px}.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #d8dee7;border-radius:8px}.queue{padding:16px}.queue h1,.work h2,.handoff h2{margin:0;color:#111827}.queue h1{font-size:20px}.queue-list{display:grid;gap:10px;margin-top:18px}.visit-row{border:1px solid #d8dee7;border-radius:7px;padding:12px;background:#fbfcfe}.visit-row.active{border-color:#2563eb;background:#eff6ff}.row-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;font-weight:700}.muted{color:#607087;font-size:13px}.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;border-radius:999px;padding:4px 8px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;background:#eef2f7;color:#35445a}.badge.red{background:#fee2e2;color:#991b1b}.badge.amber{background:#fef3c7;color:#92400e}.badge.green{background:#dcfce7;color:#166534}.work{padding:18px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px}.case-head{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:20px;border-bottom:1px solid #e5eaf1;padding-bottom:16px}.case-title{font-size:26px;line-height:1.15;margin:4px 0 6px}.case-meta{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap}.request{font-size:15px;line-height:1.5;color:#374151;max-width:760px}.constraint-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:12px}.constraint{border:1px solid #d8dee7;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;min-height:148px;background:#fcfdff}.constraint h3{font-size:13px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.04em;margin:0 0 10px;color:#536176}.constraint strong{display:block;font-size:17px;margin-bottom:8px;color:#111827}.constraint p{margin:0;color:#46566d;font-size:13px;line-height:1.4}.evidence{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px}.evidence-block{border:1px solid #e5eaf1;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;background:#fff}.evidence-block h3{margin:0 0 10px;font-size:15px}.evidence-block ul{margin:0;padding-left:18px;color:#374151;line-height:1.55;font-size:14px}.timeline{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;border-top:1px solid #e5eaf1;padding-top:14px}.step{flex:1;border:1px solid #d8dee7;border-radius:7px;padding:10px;background:#fbfcfe}.step b{display:block;font-size:13px}.step span{display:block;margin-top:3px;color:#607087;font-size:12px}.handoff{padding:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px}.decision{border:1px solid #d8dee7;border-radius:8px;padding:14px;background:#fff}.decision.selected{border-color:#0f766e;background:#f0fdfa}.decision h3{margin:0 0 8px;font-size:16px}.decision p{margin:0;color:#46566d;font-size:13px;line-height:1.45}.actions{display:grid;gap:10px}.actions button{height:42px;border-radius:7px;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;background:#fff;color:#172033;font-weight:700;text-align:left;padding:0 12px}.actions button.primary{background:#0f766e;border-color:#0f766e;color:#fff}.handoff-card{border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-radius:8px;background:#f8fafc;padding:14px}.handoff-card dl{display:grid;grid-template-columns:110px 1fr;gap:8px;margin:0;font-size:13px}.handoff-card dt{color:#607087}.handoff-card dd{margin:0;color:#111827;font-weight:700}.footer-actions{display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:auto}.footer-actions button{flex:1;height:42px;border-radius:7px;border:1px solid #1f2937;background:#1f2937;color:#fff;font-weight:700}.footer-actions button.secondary{background:#fff;color:#1f2937}
parsed.html:
Same-day repair visits

Review route, parts readiness, site access, and SLA risk before dispatch.

V-2187SLA 4h

Mallory Chen

Needs gate code

V-2188Tomorrow

Owen Patel

Parts shortage

V-2189SLA 2h

Rae Wilson

Route conflict

Parts check needed

Repair visit V-2187

Mallory ChenPriority repairSLA 4h

Kitchen freezer repair needs dispatch before the service window closes. Same-day SLA visits can be assigned when parts and site access are confirmed; missing access details return to dispatch support.

Route

Reyes is 18 min away

Nearest qualified technician identified for the freezer unit.

Parts readiness

Fan motor available

Replacement part is ready at the west depot before dispatch.

Site access

Gate code missing

Access detail must be confirmed before the technician is sent.

SLA risk

Service window closing

Delay needs an explicit handoff reason and timing constraint.

Dispatch facts

  • Technician Reyes is certified for the freezer unit.
  • Parts are available but pickup timing still matters.
  • Customer access is the only blocking condition.

Decision rule

  • Assign when parts and site access are confirmed.
  • Return missing access details to dispatch support.
  • Escalate if the SLA window cannot be protected.
NowRequest gate code
Before releaseConfirm access and part pickup
DispatchSend Reyes with SLA reason

Next action

Choose the handoff the dispatcher can act on now.

Request gate code before assignment

Site access is missing, so hold the technician assignment until dispatch support confirms the customer gate code.

Assign Reyes after access confirmed

Use when the gate code is received and the fan motor pickup remains on time.

Escalate SLA risk

Use if access cannot be confirmed soon enough to protect the 4h SLA.

Draft dispatch handoff

Technician
Reyes, pending access
Next action
Get customer gate code
Constraint
Before SLA 4h closes
Reason
Parts ready; site access missing
